description: Replace frontend 'Invite Staff' flow with direct 'Add Staff' form page and updated staff list
steps: Update frontend/src/types/task.ts: Replace StaffInvite interface with StaffCreate interface (email: string, full_name: string, phone?: string, role: 'manager'|'accountant'|'maintenance'|'cleaner', property_id?: string, address?: string, notes?: string). Add StaffUpdate interface (all fields optional). Update StaffMember interface to add: status: 'active'|'pending', property_name?: string, address?: string. Remove assigned_properties and is_active fields, replace with status field.

Update frontend/src/api/staff.ts: Replace inviteStaff with createStaff(data: StaffCreate) that POSTs to /api/v1/staff. Add updateStaff(id: string, data: StaffUpdate) that PATCHes to /api/v1/staff/{id}. Keep deleteStaff as-is (already correct). Update imports to use new types.

Create frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffFormPage.tsx: A form page (following the pattern in RenterFormPage.tsx) with fields: Email (required), Ho va ten (required), Dien thoai, Vai tro (dropdown: Quan ly/Ke toan/Bao tri/Ve sinh), Nha phu trach (dropdown fetched from getProperties API), Dia chi, Ghi chu. On submit POST to createStaff. On success navigate to /staff with a success message. Page title: 'Them nhan vien moi'. Back button navigates to /staff.

Rewrite frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffListPage.tsx: Replace 'Moi nhan vien' button with 'Them nhan vien' button that navigates to /staff/new. Update table columns to: Ten, Email, Dien thoai, Vai tro, Nha phu trach, Trang thai, Ghi chu, Hanh dong. Show status badges: 'Dang hoat dong' (green) for status='active', 'Cho dang ky' (yellow) for status='pending'. Remove the invite modal entirely. Keep delete functionality.
Update frontend/src/App.tsx: Add lazy import for StaffFormPage. Add route '/staff/new' => StaffFormPage inside the AppLayout routes, placed before the '/staff' route.
acceptance_criteria: StaffFormPage exists at frontend/src/pages/staff/StaffFormPage.tsx with all required form fields
Route /staff/new is registered in App.tsx and renders StaffFormPage
StaffListPage shows 'Them nhan vien' button instead of 'Moi nhan vien'
StaffListPage displays status column with 'Dang hoat dong' (green) and 'Cho dang ky' (yellow) badges
No references to inviteStaff or the old invite modal remain in StaffListPage
API client exports createStaff, updateStaff, deleteStaff, getStaff
Frontend builds successfully: npm run build
findings: All verification steps passed. TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit) passed clean. Vite production build succeeded. StaffFormPage follows the same useState pattern as RenterFormPage. The Property type already has 'id' and 'name' fields which are used in the property dropdown.
